name: agentation
description: Integrate Agentation into React apps and wire MCP-based annotation sync for coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Add in-app annotations and sync them to MCP-enabled coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use Agentation to add local-first annotations in React during development and optionally connect to the Agentation MCP server for live, bidirectional agent sync.
defaultPrompt: Set up Agentation in my React app and wire MCP sync for my coding agent
